name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is a global digital payments company offering a range of products and services including PayPal, PayPal Credit, PayPal Open, Braintree, Venmo, Xoom, Hyperwallet, Honey, and Paidy. The company enables individuals and businesses to send and receive payments, access credit, and manage financial transactions across multiple markets and jurisdictions worldwide.
